mode.title: Scrape Mode
mode.description: The mode of scraping: keyword, hashtag, profile, or url.

queries.title: Queries
queries.description: List of keywords, hashtags, usernames, or URLs to scrape.

max_videos.title: Max Videos
max_videos.description: Maximum videos to fetch per query.

fetch_comments.title: Fetch Comments
fetch_comments.description: Whether to extract comments for each video.

max_comments_per_video.title: Max Comments per Video
max_comments_per_video.description: Limit the number of comments extracted per video.
